fields.label: Server URL
fields.helpText: URL of your Obsidian Local REST API server (defaults to https://127.0.0.1:27124)

fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: Find in Obsidian Settings > Local REST API > API Key

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API key via Obsidian Local REST API root endpoint

metadata.summary: Obsidian vault access via the Local REST API plugin for reading, writing, and searching notes.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Install the Local REST API plugin from Obsidian Community Plugins
2. Enable the plugin in Obsidian Settings
3. Copy the API Key from Settings > Local REST API
4. Paste the API Key here
5. Optionally set a custom server URL (default: https://127.0.0.1:27124)
